INDUSTRY-SPECIFIC APPS

Own your app outright. Built for your business.

Want to own a single app outright? Browse below. Want an all-in-one growing platform with ongoing updates? Explore Minis.

📱

Choose how your app is published: under your own Google Play developer account from day one, or under Trai Inc.'s account with a formal ownership transfer once you're ready — your call.

📦

Full repository handover — source code, build scripts, and documentation included, no extra fee.

💳

Fixed-price contracts with advance payment. You know the exact cost before we start. Milestone payments on larger projects.

🔧

Post-launch maintenance: 20% of project cost annually, covering updates, bug fixes, and OS/platform compatibility.

Read our full due-diligence checklist for more detail on each commitment.

E-Commerce App

A complete mobile storefront with catalog management and seamless checkout.

Pricing & Delivery Options

Basic

₹45,000 + GST
  • ✓ Typical delivery: 1-2 weeks
  • ✓ Full repository handover included
  • ✓ Core store functionality
  • ✓ Standard branding
  • ✓ Up to 50 products
  • ✓ Delivery tracking

Pro

₹85,000 + GST
  • ✓ Typical delivery: 2-3 weeks
  • ✓ Full repository handover included
  • ✓ Payment gateway integration
  • ✓ Push notifications
  • ✓ Advanced sales reporting

Custom

Quote-based
  • ✓ Timeline based on scope
  • ✓ Full repository handover included
  • ✓ Bespoke UI/UX modifications
  • ✓ Custom ERP integrations
  • ✓ Multi-vendor support
  • ✓ Dedicated onboarding
Discuss Requirements

Pharmacy Delivery App

Enable customers to upload prescriptions and order medicines online directly to your local pharmacy.

Pricing & Delivery Options

Basic

₹50,000 + GST
  • ✓ Typical delivery: 1-2 weeks
  • ✓ Full repository handover included
  • ✓ Prescription upload
  • ✓ Standard branding
  • ✓ Order management dashboard
  • ✓ Basic catalog

Pro

₹95,000 + GST
  • ✓ Typical delivery: 2-3 weeks
  • ✓ Full repository handover included
  • ✓ Digital payments integration
  • ✓ Delivery tracking map
  • ✓ Inventory management sync

Custom

Quote-based
  • ✓ Timeline based on scope
  • ✓ Full repository handover included
  • ✓ Bespoke design
  • ✓ Local delivery partner API
  • ✓ Wholesale/B2B portal
  • ✓ Custom integrations

Restaurant Ordering App

Stop paying 30% commissions. Run your own food delivery and dine-in ordering system.

Basic

₹40,000 + GST
  • ✓ Typical delivery: 1-2 weeks
  • ✓ Full repository handover included
  • ✓ Digital menu
  • ✓ Order management

  • ✓ Takeaway scheduling

Pro

₹75,000 + GST
  • ✓ Typical delivery: 2-3 weeks
  • ✓ Full repository handover included
  • ✓ Payment gateway integration
  • ✓ Loyalty points system
  • ✓ Dine-in QR ordering

Custom

Quote-based
  • ✓ Timeline based on scope
  • ✓ Full repository handover included
  • ✓ Multi-outlet management
  • ✓ POS integration
  • ✓ Custom rewards engine
  • ✓ Full bespoke design
